Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. VERNON GOINS, TEL. NO. (510) 893-9465 MOVING PARTY;
PLAINTIFF JACQUELINA LAURENT IS ALSO PRESENT IN COURT.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. ATTY.
